WILL TAKE WEEKS


TO DIG ALL OUT

pages.raw_text:
WELLINGTON, Wash, March 3-The horror of scenes
here is indescrbable It will be weeks before the So
bodies remaining in the tangled of trees earth ice
and all be exhumed It will be days or two
weeks before those bodies recovered be taken out
the mountains.


% BODIES RECOVERED.
Twenty eight bodies have been recovered the
adding during the night.
Despite feverish work all morning, have been
found.


MRS. SHERLOCK HEROINE.
Mrs Sherlock wife of the telegraph operator here is the
heroine of the wreck She is taking charge Of the
injured at the makeshift hospital established here.
Supt O'Neil of the Great Northern who escaped the
wreck is leading the He has hopes of clear
ing the road for traffic before April 1.
